title: SQL Server Sleeping Sessions Triage
description: Diagnose inactive/sleeping database sessions that may be holding locks, consuming tempdb resources, or leaking connections
author: Antigravity

detect_sleeping_sessions.description: Detect sleeping and inactive sessions ordered by inactive duration

interactive_hints.check_sleeping_session_blocking: Run to check if any of these sleeping sessions are holding locks and blocking active queries
interactive_hints.sleeping_session_tempdb_usage: Run to check if these sessions are also leaking/consuming space in tempdb
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis based on the sleeping session count

check_sleeping_session_blocking.description: Check if sleeping sessions are causing locks or blocking other queries

interactive_hints.sleeping_session_tempdb_usage: Run to check if these sessions are also leaking/consuming space in tempdb
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final report highlighting the blocking SPID
interactive_hints.switch_to_sqlserver-live-slowness-triage: Switch to Live Slowness Triage to investigate broader server performance issues

sleeping_session_tempdb_usage.description: Check tempdb session space allocations for sleeping/inactive sessions

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final report including tempdb usage details
